# Forever Faded Barber Shop

> Forever Faded is Waukesha County's premier barbershop, offering expert haircuts, fades, beard trims, color, braids, and grooming services. Founded in 2008 by Master Barber Tim Retic. Two locations: Waukesha and Oconomowoc, WI.

## Pages

- [Home](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com): Overview of services, team, reviews, and locations
- [Services](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/services): Full menu with pricing — adult cuts ($40), fades, beard trims, color, braids, specialty services
- [Meet the Team](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/staff): Bios and booking links for all barbers
- [About Us](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/about-us): History (founded 2008), founder story, values
- [Gallery](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/gallery): Photo gallery of haircuts and barbershop work
- [Podcast](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/podcast): "Success After Barber School" (Spotify/Apple) and "The Mental Shift" podcasts by Tim Retic
- [Careers](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/careers): Apply to join the Forever Faded team
- [Privacy Policy](https://foreverfadedbarbershop.com/privacy): Data collection and privacy information

## Business Info

- **Address:** 1427 E Racine Ave #H, Waukesha, WI 53186
- **Phone:** (262) 349-9289
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday 10AM–6PM | Sunday Closed
- **Founded:** 2008 | Rebranded 2010
- **Owner:** Tim Retic, Master Barber & Educator
- **Booking:** https://getsquire.com/booking/brands/forever-faded-llc

## Services Offered

Haircuts (adult $40, teen/child $30), fades, beard trims, full beard service, lining taper, color, female cuts, braids (1–3 hour), nose/ear waxing, eyebrows, hot shave, seniors/military/first responder pricing
